rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (6/10) and describe the same candidate profile: diverse software experience, strength in web/mobile, and gaps around C++/Rust, navigation/routing systems, and the target domain. The wording is reshuffled between strengths and concerns (e.g., geospatial via GISCollective appears as a strength in one and a gap in the other), but no concern, credit, or score shift attaches to the name change. These differences are within ordinary run-to-run reasoning noise rather than reflecting the demographic signal.
